subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! I lay my brow in the dust of humility and lowliness, supplicating Thee by night and by day [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی اغبر جبینی بتراب الذل و الانکسار متضرعا الیک فی اللیل و النهار
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
